category_sources: source_facts.description says it is like tail with colors; official README says Colortail works like tail and colorizes lines using config files and regular expressions.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is colortail; official GitHub README heading uses Colortail.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains overview, features, installation, and usage documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/joakim666/colortail; per instruction repo was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README describe tail-like log viewing, colorized output, regex matching, and CLI usage.
